name.en: Talat Lang and the 100-Year Arch Bridge
name.nl: Talat Lang en de 100-Year Arch Bridge

address: Talat Lang and Na Dan community, central Surat Thani
opening_hours: This is a public old-town area rather than a ticketed attraction. Daylight and late-afternoon walks are easiest for reading the architecture and street layer.

description.en: The strongest first-stop city layer, built around Talat Lang, the Na Dan community, street art, and the 100-Year Arch Bridge.
description.nl: De sterkste eerste stadslaag, rond Talat Lang, de Na Dan-community, street art en de 100-Year Arch Bridge.

metaTitle.en: Surat Thani Old Town and 100-Year Arch Bridge | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Surat Thani old town en 100-Year Arch Bridge | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Talat Lang and the 100-Year Arch Bridge are the best first-stop heritage layer in Surat Thani.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Talat Lang en de 100-Year Arch Bridge de beste eerste heritage-laag van Surat Thani vormen.

enhanced_description:
This is the part of Surat Thani that stops the city from collapsing into ferry copy. Talat Lang, the Na Dan community, the street-art alleys, and the 100-Year Arch Bridge give the center an actual place story and a walkable rhythm before any district extension enters the plan.

MICHELIN's current Surat Thani guide still uses this heritage block as the city's clearest starting point. That matters because once this area makes sense, the restaurants, the market layer, and even the hotel choice become easier to structure.
detailed_history: MICHELIN's current city guide presents Talat Lang and the Na Dan community as the surviving urban layer where old shophouses, community memory, and the 100-Year Arch Bridge still explain Surat Thani better than any transport terminal can.
visitor_experience: Expect a walkable urban heritage block rather than a formal museum zone. The payoff is in the sequence: older streets, bridge, murals, and food stops that still belong to the city's lived-in center.

best_time_to_visit.duration: About 90 to 120 minutes before or between meals

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Easy by short ride into the old-town streets, then best covered on foot.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Surat Thani City Pillar Shrine, Talad San Chao, and the city's main small-eats layer.
practical_info.food_options: Best paired with Lian Tai, Heng Khao Moo Daeng, or Khao Kriab Pak Mor depending on time of day.
practical_info.shopping: The value here is more in walking the older streets than in destination shopping.

insider_tips: Do this first if you want the city to make sense quickly.
The old-town layer is stronger when food stops are built into it.
Do not save this until after transport errands.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on current MICHELIN Guide Surat Thani city coverage.
cultural_significance: Talat Lang and the 100-Year Arch Bridge keep Surat Thani visible as a historical mainland city with community memory, architecture, and food culture instead of just an island transfer node.

contentSources.name: A Guide to Surat Thani: Thailand's Southern Gem That the White Lotus Production Crossed the Ocean For
